title: Implementation Plan
description: The implementor's plan submitted to the architect for approval before any code is written

submitted_by.description: Implementor agent ID submitting the plan

plan_version.description: ISO timestamp used as version identifier

revision.description: Revision number — increments on each resubmission after rejection

summary.description: One paragraph describing the approach and why it was chosen

files_to_modify.description: Existing files that will be changed

change.description: Description of what will be changed and why

files_to_create.description: New files that will be created

purpose.description: What this file does and why it is needed

data_flow.description: Narrative description of how data enters, is processed, and exits or is persisted

edge_cases.description: All identified edge cases and how each will be handled

test_plan.description: Description of tests that will be written: what, why, and at what level (unit/integration/e2e)

dependencies.description: New packages, env vars, migrations, or config changes required

risk_flags.description: Areas of the codebase that are sensitive or risky to touch

cross_consultations.description: Any architectural questions asked and answered before submitting this plan
